room.caption: [G3-2B] Daggers! Hit them with the pointy end.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=96 newMapY=96 toRoom=rBelmont3_2A image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=-12

sprite_index=sBelmontDagger soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You have gained the Belmont's Dagger." fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=1210 instance_destroy()
